name: loop-store
summary: The signal loop's data layer. Append-only JSONL truth (one sole-writer stream per store: signals, runs, classified, estimates, reconcile, incidents) projected into a single readable SQLite table `events` (+ per-stream views) in state/os.db. Truth-first, gapless index, nothing fails silently. Generalised from signal-ledger.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

input.description: A stream name + an event row (already trace/four-tuple stamped by the caller).

invariants: record/<stream>.jsonl is the source of truth (append-only; supersede, never edit).
state/os.db is rebuildable from the JSONL and is gitignored.
Truth-first write ordering: append the durable record before the projection.
Nothing fails silently: a failed append is recorded to state/loop-store-drops.jsonl.
The per-stream index n is gapless 1..N — a gap is a detectable completeness failure.
One stream = one sole writer (the data-layer sole-writer rule).
governance-ledger is NOT a loop stream — it keeps its own shape and human gate.
